description: Composition Grey formal trousers in a basket weave, made of a poly/rayon blend, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, belt loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, and a zipper and button closure Fit Slim Fit; Straight leg Wash care Machine wash separately with cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations There are certain occasions that call for formal wear. Designed for men with class, genesis is perfect for the man who arrests attention without having to make a sound. Crafted from a poly/rayon blend, this pair of formal trousers is a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
